channel.title: GitHub on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub on linuxrepos

item.title: You are using GitHub WRONG!
item.description: GitHub is an incredible powerful tool, but using it in command line can be frustrating. So instead of doing something dumb like using SSH agent workarounds or Token exporting shenanigans to make git work in command line. We are going to use an amazing utility called gh to authenticate.
